titleStmt.title: SII 41.284: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 284. (A.R. No. 500 of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the third prākarā in the Jambukēśvara temple at Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: Records that Tuṟaiyūr-uḍaiyān Arayaṉ Nittakalliyāṇaṉ alias Pāṇḍiyaṉ Rājarājaṉ made a gift of dry land measuring 7 vēli and odd to the temple of Tiruvāṉaikkāvuḍaiya-nāyanār in Viḷā-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāchaṉi-vaḷanāḍu. It is said the gift land is part of the land that had been purchased by his mudaliyār (father) and that subsequent to his death it became the property of the present seller and his mother.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājarājarāja = [Picture]tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 kumpa nāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu navamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇināḷ rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu
ppācciṟ kūṟṟattuk kīḻpilāṟṟut tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ nittakalliyāṇaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyaṉ rājarājaṉeṉ taṉmatāṉap piramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu pāṇṭikulācaṉi
vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkavuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷukku Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉai
kkāvuṭaiya ṉāyaṉāṟkut taṉmatāṉamākak kuṭutta nilamāvatu Innāṭṭut taṇṭakkuṟaiyil taṇṭaṅkuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ tevāṇṭaṉāṉa teṉkaraināṭṭu veḷāṉum
taṇṭaṅkuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ perumāḷum ceyyāmaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ teṟṟi poṟkoyil veḷāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal muṉṉāḷ Eṅkaḷ mutaliyār pāṇ
ṭiyarāyar vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiyārāy Ivar Apāvattu Eṉṉutum Eṅkaḷ mātākkaḷutumāṉanilattu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ivvāṭ
ṭaimārkaḻimātattu nāṉ taṉmatāṉamāka nīr vārttukkuṭutta puṉcey nilam 7 Iraṇṭumā Innilam Eḻe Iraṇṭumāvukkum Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai murimuriveli
kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāveri niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāl Appūti kuṟai Ellaikku kiḻakku
m vaṭapāṟkellai paḻaṅkāveriniroṭu kālukkutteṟkkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilattu taṇṭaṅ kuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ Āḷa
ppiṟantāṉāṉa teṉkaraināṭṭu veḷāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār kāṇi Āṉa nilam �mukkāṇi ¿ nilam kālearaimā Araikkāṇi nīkki mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅ
ka nilam6 mukkāl mā Inta murimuriveli Ellaikkukkiḻakkum māvoṭu toṭṭamum Ilāṭarāyaṉ paṟṟu(m) Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭu Eṅkaḷutāṉa puṉceynilattu Appūti
yār Oḻukkaikku meṟku nercer mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅkaviṭṭa nilam �orumā m Āka Ināyaṉāṟku taṉmatāṉamāka nīrvārttu kuṭutta puṉcey nilam 7 Iraṇṭumām
Innilam Eḻe Iraṇṭumāvum mikuti kuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Ivvāṭṭai mārkaḻi mātate taṉmatāṉamāka nīr vārttuk kuṭuttu Innāḷ varaiyum pramā
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭāte niṉṟamaiyil Iṟṟai nāḷāl taṉmatāna pramāṇa Icaivuttiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkaṉmikaḷukkut tuṟai
yūruṭaiyāṉ pāṇṭiyarāyaṉeṉ Innilam Eḻe Iraṇṭumāvil meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kīḻnokkiṉ kiṇaṟukaḷum maṉaiyum maṉaip paṭappaiyum Āṟum Āṟiṭu
paṭukaiyum potuvum potuvāriyum pākamum pākāciriyam maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Uṭaimaikaḷum Uṭpaṭa taṉmatāṉamākak kuṭuttamaiyil Iṉilattukku Ivarkaḷ veṇṭi
ṉapote taṉmatāṉa pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭukkak kaṭaveṉākavum kuṭuttilenākil Inta taṉmatānap piramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭe pramāṇamāvutākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu taṉ
(taṉ)matāṉappiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭukkuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukkut tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ Ara
yaṉ nittakalliyāṇaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyarā[ja]ṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ nittakalliyāṇaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyarāyaṉeḻuttu Ittaṉmatāṉa
pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭeḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr Ūṟkaṇakku mutteyiluṭaiyāṉ maṇṭaiyāḻvāṉ mātuyaraṉtittāṉāṉa tillaikkūttap piriyaṉe Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭi Aṟivukkut taṇṭaṅ kuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ teṉkaraiṉāṭṭu ve(ḷ)ḷāṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivai ciṅkappirāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivvūṟk kāṇi U
ṭaiya nakaruṭaiyāṉ kuṉittāṉ Ampalakkūttaṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivai Iruñciūṟ tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉ kovintapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippa
ṭi Aṟiveṉ Araṅkuṭaiyāṉ vammi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉeṉ Itu taṇṭaṅkuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ peṟṟāṉ perumāṉ Aṟivu sayiñai Āṉamai
kku Ivai Aṟicalūruṭaiyāṉ poṉṉaṉ Intamaṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
